# Daily Report — 2026-06-01

## Task Completed
Added `bulk_update_problems` tool — PATCH multiple ServiceNow problem records in a
single Batch API call. PRB numbers are resolved to sys_ids via a preliminary `numberIN`
GET before the batch is issued. Supports 13 updatable fields: `short_description`,
`description`, `state`, `priority`, `impact`, `urgency`, `assigned_to`,
`assignment_group`, `work_notes`, `known_error`, `cause_notes`, `fix_notes`, `category`.
Registered in `service_desk`, `change_coordinator`, and `full` packages.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1349
- Coverage: 92%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Two pre-existing environment CVEs (urllib3 PYSEC-2026-141, wheel CVE-2026-24049) —
not introduced by this change.

## Files Changed
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/bulk_tools.py` — added `ProblemUpdate`, `BulkUpdateProblemsParams`, `_resolve_problem_numbers`, `bulk_update_problems`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py` — export `bulk_update_problems`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — import and register `bulk_update_problems`
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — add to `service_desk`, `change_coordinator`, `full` packages
- `tests/test_bulk_update_problems.py` — 21 new tests

## Next Up
Add `list_incident_comments` tool (GET comments/work-notes for an incident)
